LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_Standard.label: .75 cal bolter shell (Standard)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_Standard.description: A .75 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_Inferno.label: .75 cal bolter shell (Inferno)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_Inferno.description: A .75 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_MetalStorm.label: .75 cal bolter shell (Metal Storm)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_MetalStorm.description: A .75 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_Kraken.label: .75 cal bolter shell (Kraken)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_Kraken.description: A .75 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_Tempest.label: .75 cal bolter shell (Tempest)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter75_Tempest.description: A .75 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes bolters.
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter75_Standard.label: .75 cal bolt (standard)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter75_Inferno.label: .75 cal bolt (inferno)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter75_MetalStorm.label: .75 cal bolt (metal storm)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter75_Kraken.label: .75 cal bolt (kraken)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter75_Tempest.label: .75 cal bolt (tempest)

LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter75_Inferno_Relic.label: .75 cal bolt (inferno)

LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter75_Tempest_Relic.label: .75 cal bolt (tempest)
